newJobs.title: Localization Business Development Regional Lead
newJobs.salary: 面议 (Estimated: 30k-50k+ RMB/month for Fortune 500 senior role)
newJobs.postedDate: Late May 2026 (~1 week ago, as of June 5)
newJobs.jd: Reporting to the Business Development and Culturalization Manager, the Loc Business Development Regional Lead ensures localization delivery predictability, operational readiness, and quality governance for titles operating within the Mainland China ecosystem. Responsibilities: Regional Delivery Governance, Strategic Market Enablement, Partner Leadership, Quality Oversight. Requires fluently English & native Mandarin, 2+ years EA localization process knowledge, strategic planning, experience with Greater China publishing pathways. Electronic Arts is a Fortune 500 company, one of the world's largest video game publishers.

newJobs.title: Senior Specialist (Interpretation and Translation) - Language Support Services
newJobs.company: Shanghai Disney Resort (The Walt Disney Company)
newJobs.salary: 面议 (Estimated: 20k-35k+ RMB/month for Fortune 500 senior role)
newJobs.jd: Senior Specialist (Interpretation and Translation) - Language Support Services at Walt Disney Imagineering Shanghai. Provides professional language support to all Lines of Business. Key responsibilities: conference interpreting (consecutive and simultaneous), escort interpreting, whispering; document translation including meeting decks, process documents, communications, contracts; cross-check and proofreading for team and external agencies; potentially lead the language support team. Requires: 5+ years related experience, Bachelor/Master in Translation & Interpretation, strong CI/SI skills English↔Mandarin, cultural awareness. Reports to Director-Project Management.

newJobs.title: Senior Manager, Brand Localization and Experience Design, GC
newJobs.salary: 面议 (Estimated: 40k-60k+ RMB/month for Fortune 500 senior manager role)
newJobs.postedDate: Early June 2026 (~3 days ago, as of June 5)
newJobs.jd: Responsible for management of premium and select brand experiences in Greater China. Key responsibilities: Stay current on consumer trends/market insights; consolidate insights to map brand experience opportunities; leverage customer journey maps for future-state design; drive localization and pull-through of global brand initiatives in GC; collaborate with global/continent/regional teams; execute implementation and governance of branded initiatives; support strategic planning for Premium and Select brands. Requires: 5+ years management experience, hotel operations preferred, proficiency English & Chinese, cross-functional collaboration, project management. This is a localization-centric brand leadership role at one of the world's largest hospitality companies.

newJobs.title: Localization Operations Manager
newJobs.salary: 面议 (Estimated: 30k-50k+ RMB/month for top gaming company)
newJobs.postedDate: Mid May 2026 (~2-3 weeks ago, as of June 5)
newJobs.jd: Reporting to Manager of Localization Operations, responsible for embedding global readiness into operational lifecycle of Riot's products. Leads localization operations across a portfolio of products from planning through release. Responsibilities: Partner with Production/Development/Publishing to integrate localization requirements; oversee localization workflows; monitor execution health; develop workflows/runbooks/systems; leverage LMS, automation, AI-enabled solutions; build cross-functional partnerships; identify risks and drive mitigation. Requires: 6+ years localization operations/production/program management in gaming/tech/entertainment; strong understanding of localization pipelines, i18n, QA; LMS/CMS experience; English & Mandarin proficiency. Desired: automation/AI localization, change management, China compliance knowledge.

newJobs.title: Product Content Localization
newJobs.salary: 面议 (Estimated: 20k-40k+ RMB/month for listed top OTA)
newJobs.jd: Trip.com Group (NASDAQ: TCOM) is a leading one-stop travel service provider (Trip.com, Ctrip, Skyscanner, Qunar). This role is in the Writing/Editing department, mid-senior level. Responsibilities include content localization for product pages, ensuring quality and consistency across markets. LinkedIn listing confirms role is active but JD details limited due to dynamic page restrictions. Associated similar jobs from the same page include: Localization Product Manager (Pepperl+Fuchs), Localization Manager-TikTok LIVE (ByteDance), Localization Operations Manager (Riot Games), Localization Business Development Regional Lead (EA), Senior Manager Brand Localization (Marriott).
